leads.email_subject: Saw your Digital Marketing Manager listing
leads.email_body:
Hi,

Mission First. I saw your post for a Digital Marketing Manager to run WordPress, SEO, FluentCRM email automation, and social media for the Foundation. I put together a concept page showing how I'd approach the SEO, website, and email side:
https://organic-theory.vercel.app/leads/funnels/2026-07-14-htbpc-foundation.html

As requested: I've reviewed what's publicly available about the Foundation's mission and would be glad to share specific 90-day recommendations, my WordPress/SEO portfolio, and my experience with CRM and email automation directly in my application.

More at https://organic-theory.vercel.app

Gabriel Balenton | Organic Theory Founder
